title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED AND FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5014 / 52 OG No. 8, 3899 (July 31, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1487, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED AND FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item one hundred two, paragraph m, section two of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(102) Construction of Home Economics Building, San Vicente (Sur)

Barrio Schoolﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦ.............................................P1,000.00"

SEC. 2. Items fifty-eight and sixty of paragraph m, group II, section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, are hereby amended to read as follows:

"(58) San Vicente (Sur) Barrio School, Home Economics Building, Iriga

Construction ﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦ...............................................3,000.00

"(60) San Nicolas School Building,

Completion ..................................................................................1,800.00"

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
